steps: Add ~500mL Milli-Q water to a clean 1L graduated cylinder.
Add ingredients for Stock A to the graduated cylinder.
Fill the graduated cylinder with Milli-Q water to 1L total.
Vacuum filter via corning vacuum membrane 0.22 micron.
Add �3c800mL Milli-Q water to a clean 1L graduated cylinder.
Using a disposable 100 mL pipette add 100 mL of Stock A.
Mix A using a pipette - Failure to mix will cause precipitation when adding B.
Using a 100 mL pipette add 100 mL of Stock B.
Fill the graduated cylinder with Milli-Q water to 1L total.
Store the finished 1X Extracellular Saline solution in a refrigerator.
creator: Daniel Bushey
